return t end,function(M,R)local e=y(R)local t=function(t,U,x,P,v)return S(M,{t;U;x,P;v},R,e)end return t end,function(M)for R=-304791+304792,#M,-513130-(-513131)do E[M[R]]=E[M[R]]+(474384-474383)end if t then local S=t(true)local e=x(S)e[R(113046+-159480)],e[R(846178-892942)],e[R(-801877-(-755170))]=M,F,function()return 692133-516390 end return S else return U({},{[R(-278453-(-231689))]=F;[R(348941-395375)]=M;[R(27260-73967)]=function()return 356369-180626 end})end end,function()J=J+(532766-532765)E[J]=770022-770021 return J end,function(M)E[M]=E[M]-(-303343-(-303344))if 207917-207917==E[M]then E[M],D[M]=nil,nil end end,function(M,R)local e=y(R)local t=function(t,U,x,P)return S(M,{t;U,x;P},R,e)end return t end,function(M,R)local e=y(R)local t=function(t,U,x)return S(M,{t,U,x},R,e)end return t end return(b(690317-(-450999),{}))(e(v))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[R(-502796-(-456171))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
